title: S3
excerpt: description: Use R2 with S3-compatible SDKs like boto3 and the AWS SDK. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 provides support for a [S3-compatible API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/api/s3/api/), which means you can use any S3 SDK, library, or tool to interact with your buckets. If you have existing code that works with S3, you can use it with R2 by changing the endpoint URL. A bucket stores your objects in R2\. To create a new R2 bucket:
